tweets.title: Bitcoin’s future is shaped by dynamic consensus among nodes, miners, and holders. Influence is weighted by power: nodes by transaction power, miners by computer power, holders by economic power. Protocol changes prevail when validation, security, and capital align. $BTC

For the first ~7ish years of Bitcoin, the prevailing narrative for why altcoins were doomed was that they were test networks. The idea being that Bitcoin would add any functionality that proved valuable and subsume the market share. This was an early form of Bitcoin Maximalism. T
